001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.historyLog;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.HistoryLogProps;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006
007@HistoryLogProps(
008    opCode = 98,
009    displayName = "Fill Estimate Final",
010    internalName = "LID_FILL_ESTIMATE_FINAL"
011)
012public class FillEstimateFinalHistoryLog extends HistoryLog {
013
014    public FillEstimateFinalHistoryLog() {}
015    public FillEstimateFinalHistoryLog(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum) {
016        super(pumpTimeSec, sequenceNum);
017        this.cargo = buildCargo(pumpTimeSec, sequenceNum);
018    }
019
020    public int typeId() {
021        return 98;
022    }
023
024    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
025        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == 26);
026        this.cargo = raw;
027        parseBase(raw);
028    }
029
030    public static byte[] buildCargo(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum) {
031        return HistoryLog.fillCargo(Bytes.combine(
032            new byte[]{98, 0},
033            Bytes.toUint32(pumpTimeSec),
034            Bytes.toUint32(sequenceNum)));
035    }
036}
